name: Cochlear Limited
analysis: COH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 62% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$118.1400, stop A$92.6739, target A$179.7800 (2.42:1) — then trail it.
